Enter the Realm

Download Ashen Throne

Free to play. Free to download. The launcher is in final preparation — register now to be first in line when the gates open.

▸ Launcher Coming Soon
Join the Waitlist View Requirements
Pre-Alpha Build  ·  Windows 10/11  ·  ~12.5 GB  ·  Free to Play
Get Started

Three Steps to the Throne

  1. 01

    Create Your Account

    Register on the Ashen Throne website. Choose your name wisely — it will outlive you in the Realm, or it will be forgotten in the ash.

  2. 02

    Wait for Deployment

    Once the Alpha stress test is ready, you will receive an email. The launcher will handle installation, updates, and server selection.

  3. 03

    Choose Your Class & Enter

    Select your class, choose a server, and enter the Shattered Realm. The first death is the easiest. Everything after that is a lesson.

Available On
Windows 10 / 11 macOS — Coming Soon
System Requirements
Minimum
ComponentRequired
OSWindows 10 64-bit (build 1903+)
CPUIntel Core i5-6600 / AMD Ryzen 5 1600
RAM8 GB
GPUNVIDIA GTX 1060 / AMD RX 580
VRAM4 GB
Storage8.4 GB SSD
NetworkBroadband (5 Mbps+)
DirectXVersion 11
Recommended
ComponentRequired
OSWindows 11 64-bit
CPUIntel Core i7-8700K / AMD Ryzen 7 3700X
RAM16 GB
GPUNVIDIA RTX 3060 / AMD RX 6700 XT
VRAM8 GB
Storage8.4 GB NVMe SSD
NetworkBroadband (20 Mbps+)
DirectXVersion 12

Performance may vary. An SSD is strongly recommended for optimal load times in large-scale PvP encounters.

Common Questions

Before You Enter

Will Ashen Throne be free?

Yes. At launch, the game and launcher will be completely free to download and play. Any optional cosmetic purchases will never affect gameplay or competitive balance.

Which regions will be supported?

We are planning a phased regional rollout. EU (Ashfeld), NA (Pyremark), and Asia-Pacific (Voidrift) servers are targeted for our initial launch window. Final regional details are coming soon.

Will cross-region play be supported?

While guilds will be region-locked to ensure competitive latency during siege warfare, your global Ironveil account, purchases, and cosmetics will persist across all servers.

Is the game pay-to-win?

No. The in-game store contains cosmetics, mounts, and character slots only. All weapons, armor, and abilities are obtained through gameplay. The Realm rewards skill and time — not spending.

Do I need an account to play?

Yes. A free Ironveil Studios account is required to log in. Creating one takes less than two minutes and gives you access to all servers and cross-platform features.

When will the launcher be available?

The core launcher architecture is in final preparation. Join the waitlist to receive an email notification the moment the client is available for pre-download.

Ashen Throne

A dark fantasy MMORPG set in a shattered world. Forge alliances, conquer kingdoms, and claim the throne.
